content.text:
Now I can clearly see atom 8 (Nitrogen, shown in blue) and its covalent bonds. Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms connected to atom 8:

## Results

**Target Atom:**
- Index: 8
- Element: N (Nitrogen)

**Neighbour Atoms (covalently connected):**
| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 9 | C (Carbon) |
| 26 | C (Carbon) |
| 71 | H (Hydrogen) |

**Geomconf Index:** 5514

The Nitrogen atom (N:8) has three covalent bonds connecting it to two Carbon atoms (C:9 and C:26) and one Hydrogen atom (H:71).

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 8, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
